.github/workflows/gradle-build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 16 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to 1.18.46 for compatibility with newer toolchains and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may have annotation processing issues or incompatibilities with Java 21 compilers.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from Lombok dependency to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove exclusion of junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
Remove explicit version from hamcrest-library dependency to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 dependency to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.

Remove explicit version from maven-resources-plugin to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.general_idea: Update build tool attribution comment in the Generated annotation from Gradle to Maven.
Update hardcoded build metadata values to reflect the new Maven build state.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with String.formatted method for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace String.format calls with String.formatted method for cleaner string interpolation in error message construction.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.general_idea: Replace the verbose Optional filter-and-map pattern with the more concise flatMap-Optional-stream idiom introduced in Java 9.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Replace String.format with String.formatted() introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.

Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
